steps.t: The Uruk-commander stands near the ugly gate up ahead. You should ask the boss when the battle will be over, for you grow bored without a drop of bloo…
Your place in line is back a ways, near some other Orcs. You should get back in line.
Your place in line is back a ways, near some other Orcs. You should speak with your neighbour.
You must try to escape! Run south, towards Helm's Deep.
You must try to escape! Run north-west, towards the Fords of Isen.
You must try to escape! Run east, along the dike.
You must try to escape! Run north...into the strange trees.
Find a resting spot at the edge of the trees.
